title: Recorded Future Domain Abuse
content:
This playbook was developed as a template to handle the ingestion of Recorded Future Domain Abuse playbook alerts.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Recorded Future pack (RecordedFuture, partner-supported).

Integrations/scripts used: RecordedFuturePlaybookAlerts, jira-v2.
